jurisdiction: H. Ayuntamiento de Los Cabos, Baja California Sur

corrections.description: Fire separation distances on east property line do not comply with municipal regulation — minimum 1.5m required. Provide updated site plan with correction.

notes: SEMARNAT coastal clearance confirmed prior to permit submission — no federal maritime zone encroachment with revised 160 sqm footprint. One correction required — resolved with revised site plan. Municipal permit granted after correction.
